caption: The video features a woman sitting in what appears to be a podcast studio, as indicated by the "BOSS TALK 101" logo and the text "PODCAST" visible on the screen. She is wearing headphones and speaking into a microphone, suggesting she is either hosting or participating in a podcast episode. The background includes a television screen displaying the name "Johnson," which might be related to the content of the podcast. The setting is professional, with a clean and organized environment, including a black door labeled "Employee Only." The woman seems engaged and focused, indicating an active discussion or interview taking place.
